description: The TriangeMesh component is used to generate mesh data which is a triangle for use with a MeshRenderer.

fields.Vertex0: The first vertex point of the triangle.
fields.Vertex1: The second vertex point of the triangle.
fields.Vertex2: The third vertex point of the triangle.
fields.AutoNormals: whether to automatically generate the triangle normals
fields.AutoTangents: whether to automatically generate the triangle tangents
fields.DualSided: whether to make this visible from the back.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert the component into a MeshRenderer to see what the mesh looks like. Don't forget to add a Material.
